conversations.lastMessageBody:
Just saying great content Ben. Been watching for a while but it’s ramped up recently 

Not calling your old content shit

Yeah the agentic agents are some of that I went into but then I come out of it because I basically discovered that it's better to get the coding backend part set up with all of the right previous history, skills, data, instructions and then start pulling through the APIs into them. They just perform a hell of a lot better.

Oh yeah mate, it's wild bro, it's changed my life. I've been talking about this shit for 12 months now and people have only just started to fucking listen. Same, talking about personal branding, which is quite a nice feeling to be fair because I know I'm not the biggest name that there is out there. I called all this shit over a year ago now; I said "ChatGPT will wank" over a year ago and now everyone's fucking jumped on it and everyone's seen, so it's just about staying updated and staying on top of it mate. The fact that you've got to that point where you've got agents that work and feel like that is absolutely fucking brilliant.

Hey Daniel,

Here’s the guide I mentioned

34 AI ...

Yeah I don’t get into chats about what anyone else is doing, I think the first thing you need to focus on is letting go of the previous attachment & focus on what you need to do now. If you do look to invest in the future, maybe don’t buy into the guarantee and instead look at who / what you need. A wise man once told me that the only guarantee you have in life & business is how hard you are willing to work, and who you go on that journey with. That wise man was me 😂 obviously we’ve been chatting for a while now, I’m not pushing an agenda on you - it’s about finding what works for you with both fulfilment & scaling - stop with the BS get rich quick schemes and do it properly
